info.title: SpawnForge REST API
info.description:
REST API for SpawnForge — the AI-powered browser-based game creation platform.

All endpoints require a valid Clerk session cookie unless otherwise noted. Endpoints that consume AI tokens will return HTTP 402 when the user's token balance is insufficient.

**Rate limits:**
- `/api/chat`: 10 requests per minute per user
- `/api/generate/refund`: 3 requests per minute per user

**Token tiers:** `starter` | `hobbyist` | `creator` | `pro`

ClerkSession.name: __session
ClerkSession.description: Clerk authentication session cookie. Required for all authenticated endpoints.

example.error: This feature requires Creator or Pro tier.

PaymentRequired.description: Insufficient token balance or missing API key

tags.name: Tokens
tags.description: Token balance, usage history, and top-up packages

tags.name: Community
tags.description: Public game gallery, likes, ratings, comments, and forks

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.description: Asset marketplace — browse, purchase, and sell assets

tags.name: Asset Generation
tags.description: AI-powered generation of 3D models, textures, audio, sprites, and skyboxes

tags.name: Keys
tags.description: BYOK provider keys and MCP API keys

get.description: Unauthenticated health check endpoint for monitoring.
Returns all projects owned by the authenticated user.

post.description: Creates a new game project. Returns HTTP 403 with error code `PROJECT_LIMIT` when the user has reached their tier's project limit.

Sends messages to the Claude AI assistant and receives a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream. The stream emits JSON objects of various types:

- `{ type: 'text_start' }` — text block opening
- `{ type: 'text_delta', text: string }` — incremental text
- `{ type: 'tool_start', id, name, input }` — tool call opening
- `{ type: 'tool_input_delta', json }` — partial tool JSON
- `{ type: 'thinking_start' }` / `{ type: 'thinking_delta', text }` — extended thinking (when `thinking: true`)
- `{ type: 'content_block_stop', index }` — block closed
- `{ type: 'usage', inputTokens?, outputTokens? }` — token usage
- `{ type: 'turn_complete', stop_reason }` — stream finished
- `{ type: 'error', message }` — error

**Rate limit:** 10 requests per minute. **Max body:** 10 KB. **Max message length:** 4000 characters.

messages.description: Conversation history in Anthropic message format

content.description: String for text messages, or array of content blocks for tool results

sceneContext.description: Current scene state serialized as text (appended to system prompt)

thinking.description: Enable extended thinking mode (increases max_tokens to 16384)

400.description: Invalid JSON, missing messages, message too long, or suspicious content detected

post.description: Creates a Stripe Checkout session for upgrading the user's subscription tier. Redirects to `success_url` (`/dashboard?upgraded=true`) on success.
Opens the Stripe customer portal for managing subscriptions and payment methods. Returns HTTP 400 if the user has no Stripe customer record.

get.description: Returns the current subscription tier and billing cycle details for the authenticated user.
Returns the full token balance breakdown for the authenticated user.
Returns token usage history. Defaults to 30 days; capped at 90 days.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days of history to return (max 90, default 30)

post.description: Creates a Stripe one-time payment session for a token add-on package. Only available to paid tiers (hobbyist, creator, pro). Available packages: `spark`, `blaze`, `inferno`.

200.description: Stripe checkout URL for one-time payment

post.description: Publishes a project under a URL slug. If the slug already exists for this user, increments the version. Returns HTTP 403 when the user has reached their tier's publish limit.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only.

400.description: Missing required fields or invalid slug format

get.description: Returns all publications (published and unpublished) for the authenticated user, ordered by most recently updated.
Checks whether a slug is available for the authenticated user (slugs are scoped per-user, not globally).

delete.description: Sets the publication status to `unpublished`. The record is retained.

get.description: Returns published games with aggregated stats. No authentication required.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Full-text search query (matches title and description)

get.description: Returns up to 5 editorially featured games. No authentication required.
Returns full game details including tags, comments, and a rating breakdown by star value. No authentication required.
Returns all non-flagged comments. No authentication required.

post.description: Posts a comment on a game. Content is stripped of HTML and capped at 1000 characters.
Adds a like. Idempotent — returns current count if already liked.
Submits or updates a 1–5 star rating. One rating per user per game.
Copies a published game's project into the authenticated user's account. Returns HTTP 403 if the user has reached their tier's project limit.

get.description: Returns the top 20 most-used tags across all published games. No authentication required.
Returns published assets with seller info. No authentication required.
Returns full asset details including seller profile and up to 10 recent reviews. No authentication required.

post.description: Deducts tokens from the buyer and credits the seller (70/30 split). Free assets are recorded without token deduction. Tokens are consumed in order: earned credits first, then add-on tokens, then monthly allocation.

400.description: Already purchased, asset unavailable, or self-purchase

409.description: Token balance changed concurrently — retry the request

get.description: Redirects to the asset file CDN URL. Requires the authenticated user to have purchased the asset or to be the seller.

404.description: Asset not found or no file available

post.description: Posts a review for a purchased asset. Requires the user to have purchased the asset. One review per user per asset — submitting again updates the existing review.

get.description: Returns the IDs of all assets the authenticated user has purchased.
Returns the authenticated user's seller profile, or `{ profile: null }` if not registered as a seller.

post.description: Registers or updates the authenticated user's seller profile. New profiles are created with `approved: false` pending admin review.

get.description: Returns all assets the authenticated user has listed as a seller, including draft/pending/rejected status.

post.description: Creates a new asset listing in `draft` status. Use PATCH to submit for review.

patch.description: Updates a seller's own asset listing. Status transitions: `draft` → `pending_review`, `pending_review` → `draft`, `rejected` → `pending_review` or `draft`. Publishing requires admin approval.

status.description: Sellers may only move to draft or pending_review

post.description: Starts an async 3D model generation job via Meshy. Returns a `jobId` to poll at `/api/generate/model/status`.
Starts an async texture generation job via Meshy. Returns a `jobId` to poll at `/api/generate/texture/status`.

maps.description: Texture map URLs keyed by map type (albedo, normal, roughness, etc.)

post.description: Synchronous — returns audio data immediately (no polling required). Uses ElevenLabs.
Synchronous text-to-speech via ElevenLabs. Returns audio immediately.
Starts an async music generation job via Suno. Returns a `jobId` to poll at `/api/generate/music/status`.
Generates an equirectangular panoramic skybox image via Meshy. Returns a `jobId` to poll at `/api/generate/skybox/status`.

200.description: Job status with equirectangular image URL in resultUrl

post.description: Starts a sprite generation job. Provider auto-selects DALL-E 3 for photorealistic styles and Replicate/SDXL for pixel-art. Returns a `jobId` to poll at `/api/generate/sprite/status`.
Generates an animation sprite sheet from a source sprite asset using Replicate/ControlNet. Token cost scales with frame count (15 tokens per frame).

sourceAssetId.description: Asset ID of the source sprite

post.description: Generates a tiling game tileset using Replicate. Fixed cost of 50 tokens.

post.summary: Refund tokens for a failed generation
post.description: Refunds tokens for a failed generation job. Rate limited to 3 requests per minute.

usageId.description: Usage record ID from the original generation call

get.description: Returns which AI providers have BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) keys configured. Requires hobbyist tier or above. Key values are never returned.

put.summary: Store or update a BYOK provider key
put.description: Encrypts and stores an API key for the specified provider. Requires hobbyist tier or above.

key.description: The API key to store. Encrypted with AES-256-GCM before persisting.

get.description: Returns all MCP API keys for the user. Key secrets are never returned — only prefix, name, scopes, and timestamps.

post.summary: Generate a new MCP API key
post.description: Creates a new `forge_` prefixed API key for MCP server access. The full key value is returned ONCE and never stored in plaintext. Requires creator or pro tier.

200.description: New API key — save the `key` field immediately, it is shown only once

warning.example: Save this key now. It cannot be retrieved again.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the key. Any MCP requests using this key will be rejected.

get.description: Recursively loads all Markdown files from the `docs/` directory. Returns structured content with titles and sections for BM25 full-text search. No authentication required.
